data.title: Meta and Microsoft's strong earnings drive tech indices to new highs. S&P surpasses 6,400, Nasdaq 100 hits 24,500. Meta jumps 11%, Microsoft up 5%. Magnificent Seven market value exceeds $19.4 trillion, both Microsoft and Nvidia worth over $4 trillion. Dow Jones up 0.1%, Russell 2000 down 0.1%. US equities gain despite higher-than-expected inflation reaching 2.6%. Bitcoin rises 0.9% to $118,871.Indices' performance: S&P 500 6,406.83 (+0.7%), Nasdaq 100 23,495.60 (+0.7%), Dow Jones 44,550.87 (+0.2%), Russell 2000 2,229.94 (-0.1%).
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc. and Microsoft Corp. led major tech-heavy indices to set new records on Thursday, with the S&P 500 rising 0.7% to surpass 6,400 and the Nasdaq 100 climbing beyond 24,500. Meta surged 11% after strong Q2 results, while Microsoft gained 5% on robust Azure revenues. The Magnificent Seven, including Microsoft and Nvidia Corp., now holds a combined market value exceeding $19.4 trillion. The Dow Jones rose 0.1%, but the Russell 2000 slipped 0.1%. Inflation data was higher than expected, with the PCE price index reaching 2.6% in June. The dollar index gained, while commodities like copper and silver fell. Bitcoin saw a 0.9% increase, trading at $118,871. Key indices: S&P 500 at 6,406.83, Nasdaq 100 at 23,495.60, Dow Jones at 44,550.87, and Russell 2000 at 2,229.94.

data.title: EU to purchase $750 billion of US energy over next 3 years as part of trade agreement to reduce Russian energy dependence.
data.description: In New York, as part of the EU's REPowerEU strategy to lessen reliance on Russian energy and under the new U.S.-EU trade agreement terms, the EU has vowed to buy $750 billion in U.S. energy over the upcoming three years to fulfill requirements. The plentiful low-cost natural gas from the Permian, Eagle Ford, and Haynesville basins, coupled with reasonable liquefaction charges and proximity to LNG export facilities, play a pivotal role in enabling this transaction.

data.title: Inventor from La Mirada, Calif. creates adjustable tool for builders to square up vertical members.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 31, 2025, a creator from La Mirada, California, shared plans for a new tool to aid builders in the quick and precise installation of vertical members in consistent square openings. The inventor aimed to address the need for an adjustable and convenient solution in construction. The tool is designed to increase efficiency and accuracy during installations.

data.title: Nuklai founder argues for better access to real-time data to tackle AI hallucinations. Nexus launched to provide a structured approach using SQL interface, backed by Filecoin, io.net, Fetch.ai.
data.description: Matthijs de Vries, founder of Nuklai, mentions the importance of addressing fragmented access to real-time, verifiable data to counter AI-generated misinformation and hallucinated outputs. He stresses that better model architecture alone is insufficient in solving the issue. A new project called Nexus, supported by Filecoin, io.net, and Fetch.ai, has been launched to improve data retrieval by offering a structured approach through a virtual SQL interface. This platform aims to provide AI systems with a consistent method to access live, traceable information, ultimately reducing the risk of fake responses. Unlike other protocols, Nexus does not heavily rely on embedding large datasets.

data.title: SEC launches ‘Project Crypto’ to update regulations for digital assets, in line with White House suggestions for 21st-century finance.
data.description: The plan aims to update the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to meet the demands of 21st-century finance. It was established following the White House's recent policy suggestions and aims to bring the SEC up to speed with modern financial practices.

data.title: Builders FirstSource (NYSE: BLDR) stock is down as they reported Q2 earnings $2.38 per share on $4.234 billion sales (+5% YoY), missing estimates.
data.description: Builders FirstSource, Inc. (NYSE: BLDR) saw a decline in shares trading on Thursday following their second-quarter financial report. The company posted adjusted earnings per share for the quarter at $2.38, surpassing the analyst prediction of $2.29. Quarterly sales were reported at $4.234 billion, showing a 5% increase year-over-year. This figure fell short of the expected $4.283 billion. The gross profit margin experienced a decrease of 210 basis points, settling at 30.7%. Factors contributing to this decline include the normalization of Single- and Multi-Family margins, as well as a slower start in the market environment. Further details on this news story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Babcock & Wilcox sells Diamond Power International business to Andritz AG, based in Austria.
data.description: Today, B&W, based in Akron, Ohio, confirmed the completion of the sale of its Diamond Power International division to Andritz AG, headquartered in Austria. This transaction was previously announced and solidified with the finalization of the deal.

data.title: Encore Mesa Spirit RV Resort wins 'Mega Park of the Year' by Arizona OHA for second time in 2025 and 2015.
data.description: Encore Mesa Spirit RV Resort, located in Phoenix, was recently honored with the title of "Mega Park of the Year" for 2025 by the Arizona Outdoor Hospitality Association (AZOHA). This is the second time the resort has received this prestigious award, with the first win dating back to 2015. The recognition highlights the exceptional quality and service provided by Mesa Spirit, solidifying its position as a top choice for travelers. This achievement underscores the resort's commitment to excellence in the hospitality industry.

data.title: Protopia AI gets $1.25M U.S. Air Force contract for Stained Glass Transform, to boost secure software development.
data.description: Protopia AI has teamed up with the Air Force Sustainment Center Software Directorate (AFSC/SW) to enhance software development security. This collaboration aims to utilize coding LLMs to ensure mission readiness. The partnership was announced in Austin, Texas on July 31, 2025. Protopia AI, a pioneering company in AI data protection, will work alongside AFSC/SW.

data.title: Interface (NASDAQ: TILE) is set to report Q2 2025 earnings on 2025-08-01. Analysts expect EPS of $0.47. Stock currently at $20.64, up 18.34% in the last 52 weeks. Analysts rate the stock as Outperform with a $30.0 price target.
data.description: Interface (NASDAQ: TILE) is scheduled to release its latest quarterly earnings report on August 1, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.47. Investors are keen on the announcement, hoping for results exceeding forecasts and positive guidance for the next quarter. Past performance reveals that last quarter, Interface surpassed EPS estimates by $0.04, with share prices dropping by 0.0% the next day. Quarter comparisons show steady growth in EPS since Q2 2024. As of July 30, Interface's shares were trading at $20.64, showing an 18.34% increase over the last year. Market analysts have given Interface an overall Outperform rating, with a one-year price target of $30.00. Keeping track of market sentiments and expectations is crucial for investors as future projections heavily impact stock prices.

data.title: EchoStar is set to announce quarterly earnings on 2025-08-01, with estimated EPS of $-1.04. Shares at $32.82, up 69.26% YoY. Analysts are neutral with a price target of $28.5 (-13.16%). Market eagerly awaits news.
data.description: EchoStar (NASDAQ: SATS) is set to release its quarterly earnings on August 1st, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $-1.04, with expectations of surpassing estimates and providing positive guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, the company beat EPS by $0.09, resulting in a 0.0% drop in share price the following trading day. EchoStar's stock was trading at $32.82 as of July 30, marking a 69.26% increase over the past 52 weeks. Analyst insights indicate a neutral consensus rating, with an average one-year price target of $28.5, suggesting a potential 13.16% downside. It's crucial for investors to track market sentiments and industry expectations as they await EchoStar's earnings report.
